source_documents: Elitez - Pricing Analysis By KPMG March 2024.pdf (independent valuation benchmark)
_metadata.notes: NRICs masked to last 4 chars. Replace with authoritative HR values before production.

share_classes.name: Series A Preference Shares
share_classes.note: Issued to Option Holders on exercise. Converts 1:1 to Ordinary on Exit Event / IPO via Mandatory Conversion Notice.

group_entities.name: Elitez (FMCG) Pte. Ltd.
group_entities.verify_note: Pricing Rules sheet in xlsx mentions FMCG 80/20; KPMG (Mar 2024) shows 100%. RESOLVE.

group_entities.name: Dynamic Human Capital Pte. Ltd. (DHC)
group_entities.note: Several ESOP holders (Jaysen, Runting, Si Cong, Noreen, Huiqing, Phua Qiu Ru) are DHC employees — minority top-up applies

group_entities.name: Elitez Property Pte. Ltd.
group_entities.note: Excluded from operational transactions / potential trade sale (KPMG assumption)

plan_adoption.plan_name: The Elitez Employee Share Option Plan
plan_adoption.plan_term: Perpetual (until revoked by Board per Clause 5)

committee.DISCREPANCY: Legal agreement version governs. Resolve with corporate secretary.
committee.powers: Eligibility, timing, quantity, pricing, modification, administration (Clause 5.3)
committee.decision_threshold: Affirmative majority including majority of Major Shareholders (Clause 5.5)

trustee.name: Lim Yong Ciat
trustee.role: Holds Employee Shares in trust for beneficial owners
trustee.legal_structure: To confirm — bare trust / custodian deed / other

pool.governance: Aggregate options outstanding shall not exceed 20% of fully-diluted share capital (Clause 6.1)
pool.post_cap_dilution: If 20% cap is exceeded, dilution passes to subsequent holders per 2026 Info Rule 5

eligibility.performance_rating_threshold: Average rating above 3.5 for past 2 years
eligibility.additional: Must show potential for scalability, growth, sustainability, stability

vesting.grant_date_convention: First calendar day of the month of the Grant Date

exercise.exercise_date_formula: Earlier of: (a) receipt of Exit Notice; or (b) 5 years from Grant Date
exercise.exercise_price_formula: 90% discount on Fair Market Value as of Exercise Date
exercise.payment_method: Cheque, cashier's order, or PayNow to operations contact
exercise.operational_window: Jan 1 invitation → 14 days to exercise → official holder by 30 Jan (per 2026 Info)

source_documents: Audited financial statements for preceding fiscal year
valuation_fmv.formula: (EBITDA × multiple) / total outstanding shares, floored at NTA / total outstanding shares
valuation_fmv.internal_methodology: 6× EBITDA or NTA whichever is HIGHER (per 2026 Info Rule 1)

kpmg_benchmark_mar_2024.note: KPMG independent analysis materially higher than internal 6× multiple. Policy choice to use conservative internal multiple.

valuation_fmv.exit_event_override: On Exit Event / IPO, FMV = actual transaction price (not the internal formula)
valuation_fmv.determination_cadence: Annual, after fiscal-year audit (published by 30 Nov)

potential_in_future.description: 75% likely to assume Senior Manager role

allocation.discrepancy_flag: Guidebook says >5yrs for 2 points; xlsx used >4yrs. Guidebook governs.

trust_structure.conversion_on_exit: Employee Shares (Series A Preference) → Ordinary Shares, 1:1, via Mandatory Conversion Notice

definitions.bad_leaver: Termination for Cause as determined by Committee (moral turpitude / fraud / gross negligence / material breach / bankruptcy)
definitions.good_leaver: Termination without Cause, or Employee-initiated termination with Board approval

bad_leaver.mechanism: Flat S$1 for ALL vested unexercised options

ipo.treatment: All unvested options immediately vest; exercisable before listing date

tag_along.condition: If company does not exercise drag

exit_events.winding_up: Unvested options vest on shareholder notice; exercisable before resolution passed

annual_trading_window.mechanism: Bid/ask form submitted by qualified shareholders

company_rofr.shares_destination: treasury, held for future ESOP grants

regular_annual_dividend.declared_at: August (final dividend notice per FY ending April)

special_discretionary_dividends.trigger: Management discretion, typically from asset sales
special_discretionary_dividends.eligibility: ESOP holders who exercise within the specified window

multi_entity_cost_sharing.rule_1_exercise_proceeds: Non-wholly-owned subsi whose staff exercise ESOP receives the exercise-price monies (2026 Info Rule 2)
multi_entity_cost_sharing.rule_2_dividend_contribution: All subsis whose staff are ESOP holders contribute back to HQ on any dividends distributed by EGPL to those staff (2026 Info Rule 3)

sesop_alternative.description: Subsidiary may swap up to 20% of own shares for EGPL shares at 30% discount; those become SESOP pool for subsi employees only
sesop_alternative.unused_sesop: Swapped back at same valuation on IPO / Trade Sale
sesop_alternative.status: Described in Guidebook Slide 5 but not currently operationalised

annual_calendar.january_01: Invitation to exercise sent to qualified ESOP holders (those hitting 5-yr anniversary)
annual_calendar.january_16_31: Annual Trading window — bid/ask, company ROFR, peer matching
annual_calendar.january_30: Official shareholder registration for exercised shares
annual_calendar.may: Notice of new ESOP grants for the year (based on performance appraisal)
annual_calendar.august: Final dividend declaration notice (based on FY ending April)
annual_calendar.december: AGM notice + next year's trading notice. AGM agenda: valuation for next tranche, business update, audited FS adoption, dividend confirmation

FY2022.note: Pre-Commencement Date — regularised under Plan adopted 5 Oct 2025

FY2023.note: No grants issued. Reason to confirm.

FY2024.note: Pre-Commencement Date — regularised under Plan adopted 5 Oct 2025

special_dividends_history.name: Adept Academy Pte Ltd Sale
special_dividends_history.eligibility_condition: Must exercise ESOP within one month of declaration to receive

data_quality_issues.issue: Stored as scientific notation in xlsx; needs clean re-entry
KPMG says 100%, xlsx Trading Rules implies 80/20 with Eevann. Resolve before platform go-live.
Legal says 3 Major Shareholders + 2 senior employees; Guidebook says 2 employees + 1 Management. Resolve.
Singaporean in Final 2024 sheet; Malaysian in Final 2025 and 2026 Info. Confirm.
In xlsx Final 2025 appears active (ref #5) and terminated (ref #29 with zeros). NOT in 2026 Info Special Dividend list. Treated as Left/terminated here — confirm.
FY2022 and FY2024 grants pre-date Plan commencement (5 Oct 2025). Confirm how they're covered — is the Plan retroactive or is there a separate instrument?

data_quality_issues.topic: Samion Ong / Philip Leong / Asmond Soh
data_quality_issues.issue: Left — need Good vs Bad Leaver determination by Committee to compute clawback (even if already forfeited in practice)
Confirm intentional gap vs missing records
Internal 6× vs KPMG 8–9×. The conservative internal multiple reduces immediate taxable perquisite at exercise but also reduces exit multiple if not revisited. Is this a conscious policy?
